author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how Chartbeat provides real-time analytics. It helps me understand my audience's behavior instantly, allowing me to make quick content decisions.
cons: The downside is that the interface can be overwhelming at first and requires some time to get used to.

description: I have used Chartbeat exclusively to track engagement and optimise real-time user experience since I began my current role six years ago. Having used a different company's software in a previous job I can say with certainty that Chartbeat's ease of use and customer support is far, far superior.
author: Steven H.
pros: While it took me a little while to get to familiar with, I now find the historical dashboard particularly invaluable for comparing the performance of content from different site categories over time. In my industry, headline testing is very important, and Chartbeat's tool for this makes the process very easy, as does the heads-up display function.
cons: No real complaints. The interface can sometimes appear quite "busy", at times so perhaps there is scope for this to be streamlined somewhat.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how easy it's been to integrate this into our website and use it to do a/b testing on pieces even after they're published. The testing widget is very intuitive and supports a large number of variants.
cons: It'd be amazing if we could eliminate CERTAIN variants while they're testing without canceling the entire test. That way the remaining, stronger variants can finish faster. Adding variants mid-test could be nice too potentially but is probably a lot trickier to do/get good results for.

description: We use chartbeat for real-time traffic analysis. It helps us understand what assets we're wining on, which need to be improved and even helps us determine more content to write based off what does well.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of use and segmentation in real-time help us truly understand our audience, reach and when it's time to freshen articles.
cons: I can't find much to complain about. It's a bit costly and some of our teams can't afford it.

description: Overall, we're able to see how well stories are doing on our news site and it helps the digital team to understand what might do well and should be a higher priority.
author: William S.
pros: Analytics on where traffic is coming from and how much. It's helpful to see that a story is gaining traction to know to get a video in there before it airs on TV. The ability to look at other news stations in our company across the state, region and even the country is a great asset to fin trending topics.
cons: Not much to say here. It does however seem that when there are multiple authors on a story/post, Chartbeat doesn't factor them into the individual's overall views. Nothing major, just a bit of a nuisance some days.

review_title: Chartbeat beats ahead of Google Analytics
description: This overall experience with Chartbeat has taken us off Google Analytics (not completely but close).
author: Cameron M.
pros: The real-time dashboard is far superior to GA and also the reporting structure sent to my email on my frequency of choice on a per-author basis is the best feature it has
cons: The understanding of the differences to Google Analytics was difficult at first but the description and new FAQ answers helped assist that – nothing I don't like!

description: Very positive overall experience and we can adapt nimbly thanks to real-time analysis
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use and integrate among the team
cons: I find the archival features a little difficult to get to grips with, whereas current content is simpler to harness

review_title: So easy a sheep could use it
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's user-friendly, easy to navigate and the data I need is very simple to see/access throughout the day.
cons: I can't go back and track how one particular item did on our site.

review_title: Chartbeat is an essential tool for any digital publisher
description: I have never been disappointed by Chartbeat. Any technical issues are quickly disclosed and resolved. Customer support is responsive, and the product is fairly priced for smaller publishers.
author: John C.
pros: Chartbeat is extremely easy to deploy, reliable and frankly indispensable. And the smartphone app is killer.
cons: The number and type of alerts I can set are limited, so I would like to have more options for alerting me to various trends.

description: As a digital reporter, Chartbeat is an essential part of my daily workflow. I use it to check the engagement on my stories from the day before, to test multiple headline options, and to see how my posts fare over the course of the day.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Daily reports with statistics on engagement on all of my articles; real-time statistical tracking; headline testing;
cons: The search capabilities for past data could be a little more user-friendly

description: I've always enjoyed working with Chartbeat and find their team and software to be of a high quality
author: Cyrus E.
pros: The HUD and in particular headline testing are invaluable tools in our day-to-day publishing operations
cons: I would love a heatmap feature which could track when and where people drop out of the page as they scroll down.

review_title: Chartbeat is the best option for understanding web analytics
author: Leah S.
pros: I like that I can see real time data that allows me to then determine the best course of action for distribution of content.
cons: I wish there were more demographic categories of users.

description: Happy with how it's bolstered my online content and story generation. It's also critical to know how users are gained, so I can plan out my sharing on social media, etc.
author: Kaley R.
pros: Gleaming graphics and simplified format make it easy to check (very very often) on how stories are performing.
cons: Jumping in and out of historical pages or author segments can be a bit full of friction.

description: Chartbeat helps me understand what stories are doing well on the website and which are not. That knowledge helps me in evaluating staff and in planning future news coverage.
author: Mark S.
pros: It's easy to use and clearly readable. It's a great snapshot.
cons: I have no complaints. It does the job that I expect it to do.

author: Jane W.
pros: Our company uses Chartbeat and it has made such a big difference in our daily editorial content planning since we implemented it.
cons: I need to learn to tweak the Chartbeat alerts to only see spike alerts over a certain threshold.

author: Ese E.
pros: I like that the tool functions in real-time.
cons: There is no way to freeze the data as far as I can tell. It can be a bit hard on the eyes with the data constantly changing. I know this contradicts what I enjoy most, but having the option to stop the data at a given point in time would be helpful.

description: I use it every day, and it's a brilliant piece of software for my industry.
author: Gareth B.
pros: Ease of use, at-a-glance analytics, instant data
cons: Can be clunky to use on occasion, would like more shortcuts
